title: CCTV RTSP Stream Packet Loss and Jitter Health
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:rtsp" earliest=-4h
| eval loss=tonumber(coalesce(rtp_packet_loss_pct, packet_loss_pct, ""))
| eval jitter=tonumber(coalesce(rtp_jitter_ms, jitter_ms, ""))
| where loss>1 OR jitter>40
| stats avg(loss) as avg_loss avg(jitter) as avg_jitter by stream_id encoder_ip
description: Lossy streams produce garbled evidence and false motion; network QoS issues show up before total disconnect.
value: Speeds collaboration with network teams on multicast and QoS.
implementation: (1) Probe or VMS-export RTP stats. (2) Map stream_id to camera. (3) Alert sustained >1% loss.
visualization: Dual metric line; top bad streams.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Sensor anomalies during cleaning, calibration, or planned environmental changes.
